data.acceptance:
1. POST /api/plans creates or updates an execution_plan knot and returns its knot id as planId.
2. GET /api/plans/:id reads its response from the execution_plan knot payload.
3. GET /api/plans?repoPath=... lists execution_plan knots for the repo path and returns payload-backed summaries.
4. Foolery no longer depends on sidecar or in-memory-only execution-plan persistence for the supported API flows.
